family_disposition: CLOSED — both candidates tested, neither produced confirmed exploitable edge
final_family_conclusion: W-family mechanism (starter handoff stress x bullpen depth pressure) is structurally real but market-priced. No branch produced a confirmed exploitable edge. W01 preserved as context layer candidate. W02 failed OOS decisively.
starter_fragility_component_a_note: Component A alone (opp_sp_workload_ip_last_3 <= 4.67) showed the most consistent structure: disc +0.247 / val +0.008 / OOS +0.297. Worth revisiting as standalone in a future pass with tighter threshold design.
allowed_future_use: Anti-duplication reference for future discovery passes
Context layer in future multi-signal model architecture
Component A standalone investigation in future bounded discovery
disallowed_current_use: Reopening W02 without genuinely different theoretical basis
w01_carry_forward_note: W01 (short-outing starter risk x depleted bullpen) is a real structural mechanism but not a confirmed exploitable edge. The market prices most of the effect through closing totals. Residual is trivial in discovery, reverses in validation, and near-zero in OOS. Preserve as future layer/context candidate.
w01_component_a_carry_forward_note: The starter fragility component alone (opp_sp_short_outing risk threshold) showed the most consistent structure across the W01 family — disc +0.247 / val +0.008 / OOS +0.297. Not exploitable as currently formulated, but worth revisiting as a standalone signal in a future bounded discovery pass with tighter threshold design.
w02_carry_forward_note: W02 (command instability x high bullpen usage) showed strong discovery and amplified validation but reversed materially in OOS (-0.464). Amplification pattern — validation stronger than discovery — was a warning sign of regime concentration. OOS sign flip is decisive. Shelved. Do not reopen without genuinely different theoretical basis.
next_research_direction: Move to a genuinely different mechanism family. W-family (WORKLOAD / DEPTH / HANDOFF ASYMMETRY) is exhausted as an active edge-search direction.
final_closeout_verdict: W-FAMILY CLOSED — both candidates tested, both closed, family exhausted
